title: alsine arvernensis
intro: Alsine arvernensis, also known as Verge d'Or or Golden Saxifrage, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are derived from its leaves, flowers, and roots. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as a diuretic. Alsine arvernensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to alleviate various health conditions.
